name: mask_neg_dirty_access_identity_no_bits
reason: Tests that clearing already-clear dirty/access bits is identity — verified consequence of the bitvector lemma

name: bit_test_dichotomy
reason: Each bit test yields exactly 0 or bit(i) — tests whether the bitvector fact's biconditional implies this strict dichotomy

name: mask_neg_dirty_access_preserves_bit0
reason: Masking out dirty/access bits preserves bit 0 — tests that MASK_NEG_DIRTY_ACCESS doesn't accidentally clear the present bit
